title: hieracium florentinum subsp. obscurum
intro: Hieracium florentinum subsp. obscurum is a subspecies of the Hieracium florentinum plant, belonging to the dandelion family and commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It is a flowering plant used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and promoting digestion, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Hieracium florentinum subsp. obscurum is often used as a tincture or infusion, typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol to extract its active compounds.
